claimText: Princeton University's Office of Information Technology states that Microsoft Copilot is currently the only generative AI tool made available by OIT, and that when logged in with a Princeton University account, Copilot provides Enterprise Data Protection where prompts and responses are not used to train the underlying large language models and chat data is encrypted.

citation.publisher: Princeton University Office of Information Technology
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
